'''Jommillia''' was a fierce [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warrior on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin]]. Jommillia wore a plumed decorative [[helmet]] and armed himself with a [[Axe/Legends|battleaxe]] and [[Spear/Legends|spear]].

When [[Annikin Starkiller]] was carried to the Wookiee settlement by [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], he awoke in a circle of curious [[Alien/Legends|aliens]]. Jommillia saw the interloper as a chance to fight, an activity the Wookiee greatly enjoyed. He put on a show, intending to intimidate or provoke the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

Annikin threatened and insulted the Wookiee in a variety of tongues, though this was ineffective, as they had no languages in common. Finally, the Wookiee threw his axe at Annikin, who, using the force, easily caught it.

A scuffle ensued, and Jommillia's spear was broken. Annikin was hit on the head. Before anyone can be seriously injured, Chewbacca's father, [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Auzituck]], the chief of the [[Attichitcuk's family|Kaapauku]] (or [[Sawa]]) tribe intervened and ended the fight, impressed by Annikin's prowess.

It was inclear what happened to Jommillia later, though the Wookiees tribe joined in an attack on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Outpost]] and manned [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in the attack on the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

==Behind the scenes==
*This confrontation appears in a modified form in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|Episode VI]], when the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] threaten to sacrifice and eat the heroes. As in the rough draft here, a potential danger from a primitive tribe with a language barrier is averted in the last moment.

*The Wookiee elder [[Merumeru/Legends|Merumeru]] also wears a helmet and carries a spear in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]].
